summary: Remediation attempt 1 fixes the incomplete-contract failure context and passes focused recovery, exhaustion, deadline, and cancellation tests. The whole target state still lacks the issue-required scripted fake app-server/active-shell journey and an activity-retry or Temporal-replay deduplication boundary test.

remainingWork.requirement: Hermetic scripted Codex/app-server recovery and exhaustion scenarios
remainingWork.remainingWork: Add the issue-described fake app-server journey through the managed-session boundary, including the outer-wrapper/inner-active-shell condition and same-session recovery.

remainingWork.requirement: Activity retry or Temporal replay cannot create duplicate continuation turns
remainingWork.remainingWork: Exercise retry/replay against request tracking and prove the deterministic continuation request ID is deduplicated.

testResults.notes: 66 Python adapter tests and 980 frontend tests passed; 238 frontend tests skipped.
